evidence_label: general curative-route radar, not treatment advice
doctor_conversation_use: ask which curative branch belongs in scope after packet review
ask whether genotype, age, organ status, immune status, HLA, donor, and center access are sufficient for a specialist to screen
ask which route is benchmark-only versus clinically actionable
decision_rule: The radar can update the public research map because it records current general evidence and route labels only. Case-specific interpretation remains blocked until qualified clinician review and private packet completion.
